title: tragacantha redunca
intro: Tragacantha redunca, also known as the Horse-thorn or Horse-thistle, is a plant species belonging to the thistle family. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to treat digestive issues such as diarrhea and dyspepsia, due to its antispasmodic and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Tragacantha redunca include reducing inflammation, alleviating pain, and acting as a natural antacid. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as a tea by infusing the flowers and leaves in hot water, or used in herbal remedies in the form of tinctures and decoctions.
